lead_profile_text: Purchase — Off-plan 1 bed top-floor apartment, Victory Place, Warwick Road, Old Trafford (between Old Trafford Football Ground and Emirates Cricket Ground). STL mortgage arranged. Due complete June 2026. 15 of 86 apartments in block permitted as Airbnb. Marbec Property Ltd. Gross ~£26,000/yr, £116 nightly, 63% occupancy, net ~£16-17k/yr before mortgage and bills.
emotional_profile: Long-term investor; pragmatic expectations — 'long-term investment rather than major extra income'; not chasing huge returns; responded well to honesty about review ramp-up; blocked purely by completion date

top_objections.text: Same-block competition — up to 15 Airbnbs in same 86-unit building
top_objections.zac_response: Stadium proximity events demand offsets block competition; dynamic pricing captures event uplift

top_objections.text: New listing starts slow — 3-6 months to build reviews before full income potential
top_objections.zac_response: Honestly acknowledged; lead's long-term investment mindset meant she accepted this

top_objections.text: Key access restrictions per block management rules
top_objections.zac_response: Key safe, KeyNest or smart lock options outlined subject to block management approval

top_questions.text: What income can I realistically expect from this property?
top_questions.answer: Gross ~£26,000/yr, £116 nightly, 63% occupancy, net ~£16-17k/yr before mortgage and bills

top_questions.text: How does guest access work given block management restrictions?
top_questions.answer: Key safe, KeyNest or smart lock — subject to block management rules; options exist

top_questions.text: How competitive is the local market with other Airbnbs in the same block?
top_questions.answer: Stadium proximity demand offsets block competition; dynamic pricing updated daily captures event rate uplift

what_moved_them: Stadium proximity — Old Trafford Football Ground and Emirates Cricket Ground events demand
STL mortgage already in place — no consent to let barrier
Long-term investment mindset — not expecting huge returns; ramp-up accepted
Contract sent for review — progressed to next stage pre-completion
what_fell_flat: Completion date means no onboarding action possible until June 2026

conversion_gaps.gap: Off-plan completion blocks all onboarding until June 2026
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Zac to follow up ~May 2026 pre-completion; light-touch engagement to keep warm without pressure

offer_framing: No offer made at this stage — timing not right; contract sent for review to maintain momentum
zac_income_intro: Gross ~£26,000/yr, £116 nightly, 63% occupancy, net ~£16-17k/yr before mortgage and bills
zac_reassurance_phrases: Honest acknowledgement that year 1 income will be below full-potential while reviews build
